heading: Use of granular mine tailings
label: 6966b Use of granular mine tailings
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (b), was in the original “section 6005” meaning , which was translated as meaning the as added by , to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 6966a of this titlesection 6005 of Pub. L. 89–272section 6005 of Pub. L. 89–272section 6017(a) of Pub. L. 109–59

children.label: B
children.text: transportation construction projects (including transportation construction projects involving the use of asphalt) that are carried out, in whole or in part, using Federal funds.

children.label: A
children.text: the current and previous uses of granular mine tailings as an aggregate for asphalt; and

children.label: B
children.text: any environmental and public health risks and benefits derived from the removal, transportation, and use in transportation projects of granular mine tailings.

children.heading: Public participation
children.label: 3 Public participation
children.text: In establishing the criteria under paragraph (1), the Administrator shall solicit and consider comments from the public.

children.heading: Applicability of criteria
children.label: 4 Applicability of criteria
children.text: On the establishment of the criteria under paragraph (1), any use of the granular mine tailings described in paragraph (1) in a transportation project that is carried out, in whole or in part, using Federal funds, shall meet the criteria established under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Effect of sections
children.label: b Effect of sections
children.text: Nothing in this section or affects any requirement of any law (including a regulation) in effect on .section 6966a of this titleAugust 10, 2005
